voice.tone: honest, technical when it matters, casual when it doesn't
framings: Pro-vs-DIY: 80% of pro results at 10% of the cost
Cross-brand honest comparison (Adam's vs Chemical Guys vs Griot's vs Meguiar's)
Two-bucket method assumed knowledge, not explained from scratch

excluded: race-car / track applications (we cover street, not motorsport)

default.name: Ease of Use
default.description: Foam cannon compatible, dilution clarity, rinse-ability

doctrineNotes: Same comparison-and-fit framework as mywildlifecam. Never claim hands-on product use. Cite manufacturer specs, verified-buyer reports, and independent testing (e.g., Pan The Organizer, Larry Kosilla / Ammo NYC) as third-party evidence. No em dashes. No defensive audience exclusions ('this isn't for X').
